summary: Horizontal video. Cable-news broadcast footage (Newsmax / National Report) of President Trump receiving a McDonald's fast-food delivery at the Oval Office entrance, with LIVE chyrons and scrolling news tickers. It is TV news footage with anchor voiceover and no music track.
